pageContext.name: Eistibus: As Foretold
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Eistibus: As Foretold Fine Art Print, an original fantasy art print by artist Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this mystic image reveals the clairvoyant Seraphim with the power of prophecy.  While the future may feel uncertain to mortal minds, the mental clarity of the Angel of Divination can uncover truth laid out in signs. From the imagination of artist Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artist anthology inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. As a celestial manifestation of earthly beliefs, the Seraphim Eistibus draws from symbols of fate such as tarot cards, candles, and crystals to perceive the nature of the world. Curious travelers may find fortune and ruin in equal measure contained within this angel's deck.   This destined design is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Eistibus: As Foretold Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium series logo as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this angelic fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  If you seek answers, you need only ask and add the Eistibus: As Foretold Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher to your collection today.
